data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select tab.*, ( (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no) || (select member_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no) || ' ' || (select member_surname from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no) ) as member_name, ( select member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no ) as member_group_name, ( select count(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = tab.loan_contract_no ) as count_coll, ( (select lpad((last_document_no + (tab.row_no - 1 )),6,'0') from sc_cnt_m_document_no_control where document_code = 'BOOKCHANGECOLL') || ' / ' || (select document_year from sc_cnt_m_document_no_control where document_code = 'BOOKCHANGECOLL') ) as doc_no from ( select sum(1) over(order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as row_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as as_name, (select sysdate from dual) as today, ( select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract where ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' OR sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status is null) /*--Test Case--*/ -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '002796' ) -- and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = '045401156' ) /*WHERE*/
order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ASC ) tab
